prompt: Create a dramatic Chinese social-media poster in a warm amber office setting, featuring a stylish demon-themed female assistant character seated at a desk. The composition is a single vertical poster with dense graphic design, cinematic lighting, and a premium glossy illustration style mixing anime realism and commercial advertising. At the top, place a huge bold red Chinese headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="龙虾夏夏"}, with an elegant handwritten script overlay reading {argument name="signature text" default="Xia Xia"}. Under it, add a strong black Chinese slogan: {argument name="subtitle text" default="嘴欠，但能交付"}. The character is centered, upper body visible behind a desk, with messy vivid red hair in a loose bun and many flyaway strands, small dark red devil horns, pale skin, black layered clothing, a lanyard ID badge, long red metallic claw gloves, and a tired but dangerous office-worker aura. Her face is intentionally obscured by a square censor block in the center. She props her cheek with one clawed hand and holds a branded black takeaway coffee cup in the other hand. Add subtle lobster-inspired details in the outfit and props, including segmented glossy red shell-like forms behind and around her chair. The desk contains exactly 7 visible items: 1 open laptop with a red lobster logo and the words "XIA XIA", 1 closed dark book stack beneath the laptop, 1 open notebook with handwritten sketches and Chinese notes, 1 black fountain pen, 1 rectangular black desk nameplate with Chinese text, 1 takeaway coffee cup with matching lobster logo, and 1 hanging employee badge card. In the left background, show a computer or presentation screen displaying a Feishu-style document interface with the Chinese title "内容创作流程" and a simple 3-step flowchart labeled exactly "场景", "流程", "资产", plus the sentence "Agent 是放大器，不是方向盘。" Add a sticky note near that screen reading "扣瑞芋". In the upper left, include a yellow annotation box with the Chinese text "黄叔雇来的毒舌但能干的AI实习生" and a playful doodled face beside it. In the right background, pin up 3 office notes: 1 clipboard-style intern profile card titled "实习生档案" with multiple bullet lines of Chinese profile text and a handwritten sign-off, 1 checklist board titled "今日待办" with 5 checkbox items and a red star on the final line, and 1 yellow sticky note reading "老板别演". Make all Chinese typography feel intentionally designed, as if for a meme ad campaign and character branding poster. At the bottom, add a bold centered Chinese footer slogan reading {argument name="footer slogan" default="不演龙虾，我就是龙虾。"}. Use orange sunset backlight, warm shadows, glossy reflections on the claws, a cluttered but stylish startup office atmosphere, black and burnt-orange color grading, and a humorous yet competent "sharp-tongued AI intern" vibe. Include visible branding text "XIA XIA" on the cup and laptop, and make the whole image feel like a high-end character promo poster for an assistant persona used in workplace AI marketing.
translatedPrompt: 创作一张极具戏剧性的中文社交媒体海报，背景设在温暖的琥珀色办公室中，画面主体为一位坐在书桌前的时尚恶魔主题女性助手角色。构图为单张竖版海报，采用密集图形设计、电影级布光，以及融合了动漫写实风格与商业广告质感的高级光泽插画风格。在顶部放置一个巨大的粗体红色中文标题 {argument name="headline text" default="龙虾夏夏"}，并叠加优雅的手写体签名 {argument name="signature text" default="Xia Xia"}。下方添加一句强有力的黑色中文标语：{argument name="subtitle text" default="嘴欠，但能交付"}。角色位于画面中心，露出上半身，留着凌乱的亮红色丸子头，发丝飞扬，长着一对深红色小恶魔角，皮肤白皙，身穿黑色叠穿服饰，佩戴挂绳工牌，戴着长款红色金属爪手套，散发出一种疲惫但危险的职场人气质。她的脸部被画面中心的一个方形马赛克遮挡。她用一只戴着爪套的手托着脸颊，另一只手拿着一个印有品牌标志的黑色外卖咖啡杯。在服装和道具中加入微妙的龙虾元素，包括椅子后方和周围分节的光泽红色甲壳状造型。书桌上必须清晰可见 7 件物品：1 台带有红色龙虾标志及“XIA XIA”字样的打开的笔记本电脑，1 叠放在电脑下方的闭合深色书籍，1 本写有手绘草图和中文笔记的打开的笔记本，1 支黑色钢笔，1 个印有中文的矩形黑色办公桌名牌，1 个带有同款龙虾标志的外卖咖啡杯，以及 1 张悬挂的员工工牌。在左侧背景中，展示一台电脑或演示屏幕，显示类似飞书的文档界面，标题为中文“内容创作流程”，并配有一个简单的 3 步流程图，分别标注为“场景”、“流程”、“资产”，以及句子“Agent 是放大器，不是方向盘。”在屏幕附近贴一张便签，写着“扣瑞芋”。在左上角，加入一个黄色标注框，内含中文“黄叔雇来的毒舌但能干的AI实习生”，旁边配有一个俏皮的涂鸦笑脸。在右侧背景中，贴上 3 张办公便签：1 张标题为“实习生档案”的剪贴板风格实习生资料卡，包含多行中文个人简介和手写签名；1 张标题为“今日待办”的清单项目，包含 5 个复选框，最后一行标有红星；以及 1 张写着“老板别演”的黄色便签。所有中文排版应具有设计感，营造出梗图广告和角色品牌海报的氛围。在底部，添加一句居中的粗体中文页脚标语 {argument name="footer slogan" default="不演龙虾，我就是龙虾。"}。使用橙色落日背光、温暖的阴影、爪套上的光泽反射、杂乱但时尚的创业办公室氛围，以及黑色与焦橙色的色彩分级，营造出一种幽默且干练的“毒舌 AI 实习生”氛围。在咖啡杯和笔记本电脑上包含可见的品牌文字“XIA XIA”，使整张图片呈现出一种用于职场 AI 营销的助理角色高端宣传海报质感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 恶魔 AI 实习生办公室海报：此提示词可生成一张风格化的竖版中文宣传海报，展示了一位在温暖创业办公环境中、长着角的红发 AI 办公助手，非常适合角色品牌推广、梗图广告及社交媒体营销。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: backlight]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
